name: Zippy Technology Corp.
summary: Zippy Technology Corp. manufactures and sells micro switches, industrial power supplies, and LED keyboards worldwide. The company offers power supplies for file servers, industrial PCs, storage systems, workstations, blade servers, communication systems, industrial equipment, medical devices, telecom/broadcast systems, and wind power equipment. It also provides sealed, rotary, push, low torque, side mini, slide, rocker, hook, tact, detect, and encoder switches, as well as snap action micro switches for use in consumer electronics, as well as computer, communication device, home appliance, industrial equipment, automotive, medical device, and military applications. The company sells its products under the ZIPPY and EMACS brand names, as well as provides ODM and OEM services. Zippy Technology Corp. was founded in 1983 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.
